prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第54名，近年排名稳定在48–55区间，属于中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及 校园安全事件（南湖校区不明生物活动），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定影响；抖音热度排名第98位（一般），短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度平稳；材料 科学与工程A（第五轮学科评估），交通运输工程A-，机械工程A-；材料学科为该校王牌，与招生专业中的材料类、交通运输类、机械类等直接对应，对相关专业报考有正向吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向契合；本省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年总人数 （约60.68万）略有增加，按近年物理类占比约60%估算，物理类考生约36.5万人，较2025年物理类36.3万人小幅增长，竞争略加剧，2025年物理类本科批459分 ，近年呈小幅上升趋势；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，在河北省招生计划占比较小（2），无显著 地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在2.2–2.4万区间、2026年计划小幅扩招约3.2%、本省物理类考生略有增加、声誉偏负面等因素，在，考虑考生规模微增和声誉影响，预测2026年物理类最低位次约23150名，区间22650–23650名。

- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、智能科学与技术、通信工程）
- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程）。

- 机械类（车辆）（含车辆工程、汽车服务工程、能源与动力工程、储能科学与工程）

- 环境科学与工程类（含环境工程、采矿工程、矿物加工工程）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间22650–23650名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如22000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信 息类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如23500名以外）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13049 → 16469 → 30144 → 24360 → 22695. In 2023, due to special reasons, it significantly dropped to 30144 but quickly rebounded. In the past two years, it has stabilized in the range of 22,000–24,000. The baseline for 2025 is about 22,695. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 315 in 2021, 329 in 2022, 318 in 2023, 301 in 2024, and 313 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 323, a slight expansion of about 3.2% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 54th, with rankings stable in the 48–55 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may affect some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 98th (average), with low short video exposure and stable application attention. Materials Science and Engineering is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-. Materials science is the university's flagship discipline, directly corresponding to majors like Materials, Transportation, and Mechanical in the enrollment, positively attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 60% in recent years, there are about 365,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025, intensifying competition slightly. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 459 points, showing a slight upward trend in recent years. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment plan in Hebei Province is relatively small (2), with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized in the 22,000–24,000 range in the past two years, the 2026 plan slightly expands by about 3.2%, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province has slightly increased, and the reputation is somewhat negative, taking into account the slight increase in candidate scale and reputation impact, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 23,150, with a range of 22,650–23,650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Category (including Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Automation Category (including Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Category (Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Industrial Engineering)
- Mechanical Category (Vehicle) (including Vehicle Engineering, Automotive Service Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Materials Category (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, etc.)
- Mathematics Category (including Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering Category (including Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (including Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (including Biology Direction) (including Biotechnology, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 22,650–23,650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22,000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 23,500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2521 → 2697 → 3681 → 3619 → 3836, showing an overall backward trend. After 2023, it stabilized in the 3600–3800 range, with a baseline of about 3836 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 39 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, a reduction of about 9.4% compared to 2025, and the decrease in slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 54th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may have a certain impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with stable application attention. Disciplines: Materials Science and Engineering A, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, all engineering. History Category majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Ideological and Political Education, Foreign Languages and Literature, Network and New Media) do not directly correspond to the university's advantageous engineering fields, so the advantage of discipline evaluation is limited in attracting History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (relatively hot), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 609,800. Based on the recent proportion of History Category candidates at about 40%, the number of History Category candidates is about 245,000, a slight increase from 243,700 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 477 points, showing an upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 9.4% in 2026, and a slight increase in the number of History Category candidates in the province, and taking into account intensified competition, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 3599, with a range of 3099–4099.
